title: Temnocalyx verdickii
taxonomy: Temnocalyx verdickii is classified in the family Euphorbiaceae, a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the spurge family. This family is part of the larger order Malpighiales, which includes a wide range of plant species. The order Malpighiales is then classified under the class Magnoliopsida, also known as dicotyledons. The class Magnoliopsida is part of the larger phylum Angiospermophyta, which includes all flowering plants. The phylum Angiospermophyta is then classified under the kingdom Plantae, which includes all plant species.
